hero.title: Leading provider of Patagonian Toothfish from the austral sea
hero.subtitle: Operating from Ushuaia, the world's southernmost port, fishing responsibly in the waters of the Argentine Continental Shelf.

about.label: About us
about.title: A leading Argentine fishing company
about.body1: Estremar is one of the largest fishing companies in Argentina. We are leading suppliers of Patagonian Toothfish, and our seafood products are served on the plates of the world's most important markets.
about.body2: We continuously improve our operations and invest in innovative production processes. We have operated from the southernmost port, Ushuaia, since 1992, and have always prided ourselves on employing the right people with the right attitude.
about.badgeText: Operating from Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego

values.v1Body: Our clients' trust is the foundation of our operations. Every day we strive to exceed their expectations.
values.v2Body: We engage and commit, we know what we are doing and we do our work well.
values.v3Body: We care and take personal responsibility for the safety of our people and the environment.
values.v4Body: Our achievements result from team effort. We share knowledge and help each other grow.

fleet.label: Our Fleet
fleet.title: Operations in the South Atlantic waters
fleet.desc: Our fleet operates in the waters of the Argentine Continental Shelf, based in Ushuaia, the world's southernmost port. We employ the most modern responsible fishing technologies.
fleet.card1Desc: Vessels specialized in Patagonian Toothfish capture using the longline system, the most selective and sustainable technique available.
fleet.card2Desc: Fleet targeting pelagic species in well-managed and sustainable fisheries of the Argentine Continental Shelf.
fleet.card3Desc: Onboard and onshore processing in Ushuaia, with the highest quality standards for the cold chain.

products.label: Seafood products
products.title: From the South Atlantic to world markets
products.featDesc: Considered one of the most prized fish in the world for its rich texture and unrivaled flavor. Caught by longline in the cold, rich waters of the South Atlantic at depths of 500–2,000 meters.
products.p2Desc: First fishery in South America to obtain MSC certification in 2012.
products.p3Desc: Caught in the rich Patagonian Argentine waters.
products.p4Desc: Processed on board and at plant, frozen at –40°C for maximum freshness.
products.p5Desc: Japan, United States, Europe, China, and the world's major gastronomic markets.

sustain.label: Sustainability
sustain.title: Committed to the future of the sea
sustain.body: Sustainability is the foundation of our operations. The existence of wild seafood products is the foundation of our company and the livelihood of many people.
sustain.cert1Desc: Grenadier certified since 2012. First in South America.
sustain.cert3Desc: Supporting the National Institute of Fishery Research and Development
sustain.i1Body: Estremar has actively promoted the certification of Argentine fisheries under the Marine Stewardship Council principles, the world's gold standard for sustainable fishing.
sustain.i2Body: As a COLTO member, we actively work to eliminate illegal, unreported, and unregulated Toothfish fishing, protecting the resource for future generations.
sustain.i3Body: We collaborate with Aves Argentinas to reduce the interaction of seabirds with fishing. Albatross group instructors embark on our voyages to gather data and minimize impact.
sustain.i4Body: We support the work of INIDEP, which works under rigorous scientific procedures to achieve sustainable management of Argentina's commercial fish stock.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about our products
contact.sub: We are always available to answer your inquiries about our products, certifications, and sales terms.

footer.tagline: Responsible fishing from the end of the world. Ushuaia, Tierra del Fuego, Argentina.
